subject: EP240416A: Khureltogoot optical upper limit
body:
N. Pankov (HSE,IKI),  L. Elenin (KIAM), A. Pozanenko (IKI),  N. Tungalag (IAG), A. Volnova (IKI), S. Belkin (IKI) report on behalf of GRB IKI FuN:

We observed the EP240416A (Cheng et al., GCN 36138) with the ORI-40 telescope of Khureltogoot  observatory in Clear filter starting on 2024-04-16   (UT) 17:57:07. We did not detect the optical counterpart (Chen et al., GCN 36139; An et al., GCN 36144).   Preliminary photometry of a stacked image is the following

Date       UT start   t-T0     Exp.     Filter   OT   Err.  UL(3sigma)
                    (mid, days)  (s)

2024-04-16  17:57:07 0.65409  54*60    Clear    n/d  n/d   19.7

The photometry is based on nearby USNO-B1.0 (R2) stars.

The given results is in agreement with the upper limit obtained by (Xiong et al., GCN 36155).
